question: Analyzing the area chart of revenue by year, which of the following statements is supported by the data?

options.A: Revenue increased every year from 2018 to 2022.
options.B: Revenue in 2022 was lower than in 2020.
options.D: Revenue did not change between 2021 and 2022.

explanation: The y-axis maximum is set below the data maximum, so the top bars are clipped and appear equal; the true values cannot be compared from the chart alone.
